daily.today_energy: The cosmic vibes are giving introspective energy, Pisces. Today's a gentle reminder to trust your gut feelings—they're basically your superpower rn. Channel that dreamy intuition into something real.
daily.love: Whether you're single or coupled up, authenticity is your love language today. Stop overthinking that text or conversation—just be yourself. The right people vibe with the real you, no filter needed.
daily.career: Your creative ideas are hitting different today. Don't sleep on that project idea you've been sitting with. Someone influential might actually be paying attention, so bring your A-game and share your vision.
daily.health: Your nervous system's asking for some TLC. Take breaks, hydrate, and maybe do something that feels like a warm hug—yoga, tea, journaling, whatever grounds you. Your mental health is just as important as your hustle.

weekly.overview: Your intuition is running hot this week, Pisces. Trust those subtle nudges pulling you toward new experiences. The energy supports authenticity over people-pleasing, so lean into what actually resonates with your soul.
weekly.love: Someone's noticing your vibe shift. Whether you're attached or single, vulnerability is your superpower right now. Real connections happen when you stop filtering yourself.
weekly.career: You've got clarity on what you actually want versus what you think you should want. That difference matters. Small moves toward your real goals compound faster than you'd expect.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness this week. Movement that feels good beats workouts that feel like punishment. Rest isn't lazy—it's strategic recovery.
